name: Barbecue Sauce 2
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Pork, beef or chicken stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoning mix ingredients in a small bowl and set aside.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, fry the bacon over high heat until crisp.
3. Stir in the onions and cover the pan. Continue cooking until the onions are dark brown but not burned, about 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the seasoning mix and cook for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the stock, chili sauce, honey, pecans, orange juice, lemon juice, rind and pulp from half an orange, garlic, and Tabasco. Stir well.
6. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking about 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Remove the orange and lemon rinds.
8. Continue cooking and stirring for another 15 minutes or until the flavors have fully developed.
9. Add the butter and stir until melted.
10. Let cool for about 30 minutes before transferring to a food processor or blender. Process until the pecans and bacon are finely chopped, about 10 to 15 seconds.
11. This sauce can be used to barbecue chicken, pork, or ribs. Makes about 5 cups.
